name_en: M46684 Monogram Eclipse Top-tier Original Size Change Chip This Discovery Small Backpack uses Monogram Eclipse canvas, continuing flexible functionality with a more compact silhouette. Front zip pocket and open side pockets facilitate access, while the interior pocket ensures organized storage. 29.0 x 38.0 x 20.0 cm (L x H x W)
